items.title: Huge early Spring deals on Samsung Odyssey monitors now live at up to 50% off with FREE game, displays starting from $90
items.summary:
Amazon’s early Spring sale deals have started rolling in, and you’ll find a bunch of Samsung’s Odyssey gaming monitors marked down by up to 50% off. The discounts are now live on both older and relatively newer displays, with prices starting at $90. There’s a solid mix of models to choose from, with some seeing as much as $500 in savings and bundled with a FREE game code for the new Resident Evil Requiem. Most of the offers are already live, and we’ve highlighted a few of the standout picks below for you to check out.

more…

items.title: Regularly $160 Logitech G515 low-profile wireless gaming keyboard is down to $70 today (56% off)
items.summary:
We just spotted a deal at Amazon that brings Logitech’s G515 low-profile wireless gaming keyboard back down to $69.99 shipped. This is the Genshin Impact edition, which debuted with a $160 price tag alongside the standard black and white variants. It dropped to the $70 low for the first time last month, before quickly selling out and jumping back up in price soon after. Now it’s returned to that lowest price once again with a hefty 56% discount on its usual going rate. This remains the best price we’ve tracked for the G515 model, with even the long-standing black and white models rarely dipping this low.

more…

items.title: It doesn’t get much less than $150 for a 27-inch QHD 300Hz curved gaming monitor, grab this AOC display at 44% off
items.summary:
While you can still grab a 240Hz 27-inch AOC QHD gaming monitor for $145, we’ve now spotted an even faster 300Hz QHD option at nearly the same price. Amazon is currently offering AOC’s 27-inch QHD 300Hz gaming monitor for $149.98 shipped. This display originally launched at $300 and has more recently been selling for around $270, so today’s deal knocks about 44% off, saving you a solid $120. It also marks the lowest price we’ve tracked for this model, and frankly, it doesn’t get much less than this for a 27-inch QHD display. This model doesn’t give up on any essentials to keep the price low, though, and you can learn more about it in detail below.

With a 1-year subscription to Hostinger Business Website Builder you can build, customize, and launch up to 50 websites in a matter of seconds, with no coding experience required, for just $19.99 (reg. $207.94). How you go about it is up to you. You can either describe what you want to the integrated AI software, or use one of the 170+ expertly designer-crafted templates provided.
